free_text: Slow-neutron cross sections of He, Ne, Ar and Kr.
The total cross section for each gas was
determined from transmission of the sample
and estimation of error due to density uncertainty.
METHOD (FNB) and FLAG added in Subents 002-005. In
REACTION code He-0 changed He-4 in Subent 002,006,010
Pressurized He gas obtained from boil-off from liquid
He-0 changed He-4 in REACTION code.
Pressurized Ne gas. Less than 20 parts per million
Pressurized Kr gas. Less than 20 parts per million
Pressurized He gas obtained from boil-off from liquid
Plot of (v * tot c/s) vs. (avg. relative velocity
of neutrons with respect to target atoms) fitted by
least-squares to obtain line whose slope is scat c/s.
SD: He-0 changed He-4 in REACTION code.
Pressurized Ne gas. Less than 20 parts/mil impurity.
Plot of (v * tot c/s) vs. (avg. relative velocity
of neutrons with respect to target atoms) fitted by
least-squares to obtain line whose slope is scat c/s.
Plot of (v * tot c/s) vs. (avg. relative velocity
of neutrons with respect to target atoms) fitted by
least-squares to obtain line whose slope is scat c/s.
Pressurized Kr gas. Less than 20 parts/mil impurity.
Plot of (v * tot c/s) vs. (avg. relative velocity
of neutrons with respect to target atoms) fitted by
least-squares to obtain line whose slope is scat c/s.
Pressurized He gas obtained from boil-off from liquid
Plot of (v * tot c/s) vs. (avg. relative velocity
of neutrons with respect to target atoms) fitted by
least-squares to obtain line whose intercept is n,gamma
